login.title: Welcome to JusticeLinker
login.subtitle: Empowering citizens to report grievances and inspire change
login.terms: By continuing, you agree to our

dashboard.create_desc: File a new complaint about any issue
dashboard.my_complaints_desc: View the status of your existing complaints

complaint.create_subtitle: Your voice matters. Help us improve our community.
complaint.subject: Subject of Issue
complaint.subject_placeholder: Enter a brief summary of the issue
complaint.evidence_helper: Uploading photo evidence helps faster verification and resolution. Up to 3 images, PNG/JPEG, max 5MB each.
complaint.evidence_desc: Up to 3 images, PNG/JPEG, max 5MB each
complaint.truthfulness: I confirm that this complaint is truthful to the best of my knowledge. I understand that filing false or misleading complaints may result in account suspension.
complaint.platform_note: This platform does not verify allegations automatically. All complaints are reviewed by moderators before any action is taken.

my_complaints.title: My Complaints
my_complaints.subject: Subject
my_complaints.no_complaints: No complaints yet. File your first complaint!

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.warning: Please read carefully before submitting a complaint
disclaimer.point1: All complaints must be genuine and truthful.
disclaimer.point2: Filing false or misleading complaints is a serious violation.
disclaimer.point3: Repeated spam or false complaints will lead to account suspension or permanent termination.
disclaimer.point4: Your identity will be protected if you choose to submit anonymously.
disclaimer.point5: Complaints will be reviewed by authorized officials for resolution.

footer.about_desc: JusticeLinker is an independent grievance reporting platform built to help citizens of Andhra Pradesh raise concerns about harassment, corruption, civic issues, and injustice.
footer.copyright: Linking Courage to Justice. All rights reserved.
footer.built_for: A harassment and injustice reporting initiative · Built for the people of Andhra Pradesh
footer.independent_disclaimer: This platform is an independent civic reporting initiative and is not officially affiliated with any government authority unless explicitly stated.
